red.scratchpad:
- Add retreat_until attribute to all units to prevent crashes and enable committed retreats.
- Prioritize killing enemy medics first, then mbt, then low‑HP units.
- Retreat when health <30% and commit for 8 ticks.
- Mortar should stay on x=22 cover line, use line_of_sight to fire over central wall, retreat to cover if health low.
- Infantry should stay near x=22 cover, use mbt as shield, and follow same priority/retreat logic.
- Medic must stay with infantry, heal allies below 50% HP, avoid moving into enemy melee range.
- Drone should orbit the edge of its 18‑tile vision, broadcasting enemy positions each tick; attack only when enemy within 2 tiles.
- Keep balanced point budget (~85 pts) to maintain durability while preserving firepower.

blue.scratchpad: Enemy massed infantry remains a threat; need more tanks (mbt) to absorb damage and protect infantry. Mortars must stay behind cover (x=22 or x=41) and step back after each shot to avoid exposure. Drones should stay at vision edge, broadcast enemy positions each tick, and only engage low‑HP targets to avoid melee death. Prioritize killing enemy medics and low‑HP infantry. Use retreat_until when hp <30% and commit to retreat to prevent oscillating. Use world.path for routing around obstacles.
